data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram utilizes a microservices architecture to manage different functionalities like authentication, feed, and media hosting.
data.technical_spec: Built on a modular setup with distinct services for different aspects of the platform.

data.title: Scalable Infrastructure
data.description: Designed to handle massive global user base with high availability and low latency.
data.technical_spec: Operates on a distributed system employing data replication and load balancing.

data.title: Graph Database Integration
data.description: Leverages a graph database for social connections and interactions for efficient querying.
data.technical_spec: Used alongside relational databases for enhanced data retrieval.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Employs a global Content Delivery Network for fast media delivery.
data.technical_spec: Media files are cached and served from geographically dispersed locations.

data.title: Cloud-based Deployment
data.description: Operations and data are hosted on cloud services for dynamic scaling.
data.technical_spec: Relies on cloud providers like AWS or proprietary data centers.
